title: 灼热光束
effectDetails: 被击杀的敌人不久后会爆炸，造成 600 伤害。
tipKeywords: 与同类效果的叠加方式

provenance.excerpt: The Circuit | Tier 4 The Circuit (Normal) | A | 1.49% | 1 | 0.0149 Accessed through Duviri 's The Circuit gamemode | | Accessed through Duviri 's The Circuit gamemode
The Circuit | Tier 6 The Circuit (Normal) | A | 1.03% | 1 | 0.0103 Accessed through Duviri 's The Circuit gamemode | | Accessed through Duviri 's The Circuit gamemode
The Explosion does 600 Blast damage in an 18m radius at max rank, with 0% Status Chance and 100% falloff.
Explosion requires Line of Sight , and it's range is not affected by ( Primed ) Firestorm .
Can damage Arbitration Shield Drone s and make them explode on death.
Explosion damage can only be increased by Faction Damage Bonus (e.g. Bane of Infested , Roar ), Extra Hit abilities (e.g. Resupply ), or Damage Vulnerability on enemies (e.g. Molecular Prime ).
Can pop Spores when used with Toxic Lash .
Enemies killed by spread forced Extra Hit procs will explode and spread them again.
Combustion Beam is only usable on primary Continuous Weapons . This includes Robotic Weapons like Artax , Cryotra , and Verglas .
A notable exception to this rule is the Tenet Flux Rifle , because it was derived from continuous weapon ( Flux Rifle ), even though its firing mechanics are similar to an automatic rifle.
Because the Panthera 's secondary fire has a continuous and fixed range, Combustion Beam can also be equipped on it. Enemies killed by either the primary or secondary fire will trigger the explosion.
Torid Incarnon Genesis is still considered just Torid , and cannot equip this mod despite having a beam fire mode.
Combustion beam essentially functions as a weaker Molecular Prime (chain reaction effect), making it effective at clearing weak low level enemies very rapidly.
Enemies killed in one instant or vaporized on death (e.g. Volatile Runner ) will not trigger the explosion.
